creator: nivo+kw+ports.bfa274@is-root.com
text:
Works fine for me!

I am no expert on C, so if there are obvious errors in the code, I won't
see them. Feel free to modify the patch for that reason.
Thanks Alex for your contribution!

Gr,

Nils.

Those who desire to give up freedom in order to gain security, will not have, nor do they deserve, either one.

~Benjamin Franklin (American Statesman, Scientist, Philosopher, Printer, Writer and Inventor. 1706-1790)
